text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF with Medicare Part A, B, C, and D, Version 2 │ May 2026 │ V 1.2 36 

PTA_CVRG_STRT_DT 

LABEL: Medicare Part A Coverage Start Date 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the start date of coverage for Medicare Part A. It reflects the initial date a beneficiary 
became enrolled in Medicare Part A coverage. 

LONG NAME: PTA_CVRG_STRT_DT 

TYPE: DATE 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: CMS Common Medicare Environment (CME) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This
